properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v3 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Under Your grace, Your mercy amazes me Under Your wings, Your shadow covers me Your promise of love, where my heart is safely undone

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Speak to me Lord, Your servant is listening Over the noise, I hear You whispering My hope has come, and my heart is safely undone

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I found my fortress in You And my soul is anchored with You My resting place is in Your name Forever safe

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I found my fortress in You And my soul is anchored with You My resting place is in Your name

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Forever safe Forever safe Forever safe

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You are never far away Always…
